nasb.text: For I will bend Judah as My bow, I will fill the bow with Ephraim. And I will stir up your sons, O Zion, against your sons, O Greece; And I will make you like a warrior’s sword.

esv.text: For I have bent Judah as my bow; I have made Ephraim its arrow. I will stir up your sons, O Zion, against your sons, O Greece, and wield you like a warrior’s sword.

cnv.text: 我把猶大作我手上拉開的弓， 把以法蓮作我弓上的箭。 錫安哪！我必激動你的眾子，去攻擊希臘的眾子； 我必使你像勇士的刀劍。

ccb.text: 我必把犹大当弓拉开， 把以法莲当箭搭上， 使锡安的众子如勇士之剑， 去攻打希腊的众子。
